sections: HCM-1.4 — Profile-aware setup and doctor decisions
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-1.4 profile-aware setup and doctor decision proof gate
reviewed dependency, implementation, and proof evidence

repo_truth: Fresh read-only Review 2 of the exact nine-file remediated HCM-1.4 planning subject. Review 1 returned six Required findings; the parent accepted all six but deliberately removed the false reset-atomicity claim instead of widening into unrelated route-state repair, and narrowed condition behavior to exact unknown rather than invent evidence authority. The predecessor dispatch and both proof walls are manifested as lineage. Independently validate every remedy and the complete packet against live authority/source; inherit no prior verdict.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted nine-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint before review.
Review every byte of 00, 04, 06, current SPEC/plan/unchecked todo, original/remediation proof, and predecessor immutable dispatch.

Read unchanged control-pack authority, landed HCM-1.1/HCM-1.2/HCM-1.3 source/tests/records, live setup/doctor/route-state/CLI/profile/condition/registry code, Cargo manifests, package proof, CI, and official Cargo docs only as needed.
Run read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, API feasibility, scope-allowlist, TDD-ordering, package/source-tree, cross-platform, compatibility, determinism, and security checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
No Rust, Cargo, runtime/product, reset repair, condition evidence/evaluator, compiler publication, CI, canonical content, HCM-2+, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, adapter, contract, or dock implementation.

Do not infer an unspecified evidence producer, freshness/evaluator contract, compatibility bridge, CLI input, reset transaction, publication change, final HCM-4 DTO, content authority, or later-slice behavior.
Do not treat parent remediation or the predecessor review as approval.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact nine-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with severity, exact file/line, violated gate, concrete failure, smallest remediation, and invalidated proof.
Re-verify R001: 00/04/06/packet all state current HCM-1.1 through HCM-1.3 dependency truth and planning-only HCM-1.4 authorization without implementation/HCM-2 activation.

Re-verify R002: live authority leaves evidence inputs/evaluator separate; no HCM-1.4 input API can manufacture authority; exact condition definition/fingerprint maps only to unknown/unavailable/indeterminate/null evidence fingerprint; six names are vocabulary, not falsely implemented outcomes.

Re-verify R003: route_state remains unchanged and outside scope; complete profile preflight precedes current reset; invalid/indeterminate starts no mutation; the packet truthfully reports possible partial legacy reset failure and does not claim rollback.

Re-verify R004: every engine/compiler public type, owned field/accessor, error/reason, default/injected signature, serialization, status/action/exit mapping, old-type removal, custom-profile seam, and sole shared owner is exact, feasible, complete, and within allowed paths.

Re-verify R005: compiler package proof is absent; engine 29-member package proof remains literal; compiler source-tree/workspace metadata/tests/unchanged-manifest/path/leak proof is exact and feasible under no-Cargo scope.
Re-verify R006: named focused tests must execute on an actual Windows MSVC host with stop-on-unavailability; cross compilation cannot substitute and no unauthorized workflow edit is assumed.

Review the complete setup/doctor shared-closure cutover, structural-only inspection, no-write/rewrite refusal, CLI wording/JSON ownership, fixed-path absence, TDD increments, security/determinism/regression wall, classification ceiling, and implementation separability for any new Critical/Required issue.
Verify exact existing/new file allowlists cover every named code/test/proof/primary/closeout task and forbid all unrelated surfaces without making a mandatory check impossible.
Verify todo is unchecked, current planning mutations are docs-only, lineage is honest, final review/two-commit choreography is exact, and no HCM-2 work starts.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, live source, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.

Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than filling missing evidence authority, API field/type, compatibility, reset transaction, publication, platform proof, content authority, or later-slice decision by inference.
Return to the parent if remediation would require Rust/runtime work, broader control-pack authority, HCM-2+, or global handoff/ledger mutation.
